# VIDEO_FAILED_TO_LOAD

**Enumeration Case**

Video asset failed to load.

## Declaration

```swift
const number VIDEO_FAILED_TO_LOAD;
```

## Discussion

Error code for when the video component of the Live Photo is unable to be loaded. This could be due to network conditions or an inability to decode the video.

## Enumeration Cases

- **PHOTO_FAILED_TO_LOAD**: Photo asset failed to load.
title: VIDEO_FAILED_TO_LOAD
